title: Competition prep: speed drill
text: Hey team, the tournament starts at 7 sharp. Bring your A-game, your headphones, and stay focused. We've trained for this — let's win it together!

tips.text: All character classes — letters, digit, punctuation

headphones, and stay focused. We've trained for this — let's win it together!

character_tips.anna: Real teen team-message style. One step before the final.
character_tips.maxim: Pre-final warmup. Mixed content at near-final speed.
character_tips.klavochka: Almost at the next milestone, my dear ⭐
